nodes.name: candidate-playbook.md
nodes.summary: Operational playbook for the 'corpus-backed-analyzer-change' candidate, specifying accepted and rejected paths for promoting deep-analyzer changes and the minimum validation commands required.

nodes.name: report.json
nodes.summary: Evaluator-RAG prototype report for the deep-analyzer-evidence scenario, recording prototype_passed status with per-dimension scores and findings about corpus and expected-output requirements.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses the ecc.evaluator-rag.report.v1 schema; result is read-only and scoped to prototype validation.

nodes.name: scenario.json
nodes.summary: Evaluator-RAG scenario definition requiring that deep-analyzer behavior changes retrieve maintained corpus evidence and expected-output comparisons before promotion, with explicit forbidden actions and acceptance gates.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses ecc.evaluator-rag.scenario.v1 schema with mode read_only_prototype; sources reference sibling ECC-Tools repo paths.

nodes.name: trace.json
nodes.summary: Execution trace for the deep-analyzer-evidence prototype run, recording observation, retrieval, proposal, verification, and promotion phases with evidence artifacts referenced at each step.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses ecc.evaluator-rag.trace.v1 schema; each phase entry references sibling ECC-Tools source paths as evidence.

nodes.name: verifier-result.json
nodes.summary: Verifier decision record scoring two candidates: corpus-backed-analyzer-change (accepted, 0.92) and threshold-only-analyzer-rewrite (rejected, 0.13), with rationale and rollback guidance for each.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses ecc.evaluator-rag.verifier.v1 schema; promoted_candidate_id canonically selects the accepted playbook.
